styles.name: BBC Left
styles.look: Left-aligned white broadcast subtitles in a black rectangular BBC-style box.
styles.best_for: Vertical reporter/news ads with a lower-third bar.

styles.name: BBC Center Bold
styles.look: Centered black BBC-style subtitle block with bold Helvetica Neue text.
styles.best_for: News videos where the caption should feel like traditional closed captions.

styles.name: BBC Center Medium
styles.look: Centered black BBC-style subtitle block with slightly lighter Helvetica Neue Medium text.
styles.best_for: News videos where the bold BBC version feels too heavy.

styles.name: YouTube Classic
styles.look: Centered white subtitle text with black outline and no backing box.
styles.best_for: Cleaner videos without a heavy broadcast-caption box.

styles.name: YouTube Box
styles.look: Centered white subtitle text with black outline and translucent black backing box.
styles.best_for: News/reporter videos needing more readability than classic YouTube subtitles.

styles.name: Hormozi 3
styles.look: Submagic-style creator captions: Montserrat Black all-caps, rotating yellow/green/red accent line, black stroke, animated emoji layer.
styles.best_for: UGC confession/storytime ads where the caption is a performance element.

styles.name: Hormozi 3 Submagic Match
styles.look: Hormozi 3 with Submagic card grouping and captured emoji inventory/trajectories.
styles.best_for: When matching a specific Submagic export frame-by-frame.

styles.name: Hormozi 3 No Emoji
styles.look: Hormozi 3 text system only, with emoji layer disabled.
styles.best_for: Sensitive legal UGC that still needs punchy creator captions without emoji clutter or per-word flashing.

styles.name: Yellow Text Submagic
styles.look: TikTok/Submagic-style all-caps captions with spoken word in yellow text and other words in white.
styles.best_for: UGC ads where per-word emphasis is explicitly desired; avoid by default on sensitive sexual-abuse/prison legal ads because it can feel flashy.

styles.name: Yellow Box Submagic
styles.look: TikTok/Submagic-style all-caps captions with a yellow box behind the active word.
styles.best_for: Older UGC caption look or when the yellow-text variant is not enough emphasis; avoid by default on sensitive sexual-abuse/prison legal ads because it flashes word-by-word.

styles.name: Nick
styles.look: Submagic Nick-style sentence-case white text on semi-transparent dark rounded box, no emoji, no color accent.
styles.best_for: Cleaner legal UGC or spoken testimonial where all-caps feels too creator-heavy; preferred calm style for sensitive direct-to-camera prison-abuse ads.

styles.name: Nick High News Legacy
styles.look: Nick-style rounded dark box moved higher for news/lower-third layouts.
styles.best_for: Legacy reference only; current CA news videos should use news_bbc_left unless Nick is explicitly requested.

styles.name: Submagic Built-In Template
styles.look: Authentic Submagic template render, e.g. Hormozi 3, Dan 2, Kelly 2, Jack, Claire, Matt.
styles.best_for: When exact Submagic template authenticity matters more than verbatim caption control.

styles.name: Submagic Lewis Template
styles.look: Submagic Lewis built-in template: cleaner sentence-case style with active-word treatment and emoji.
styles.best_for: When using Submagic API's Lewis look from prior CCWF/IL JDC experiments.

styles.name: Submagic Matt L1 Theme
styles.look: Custom Submagic theme created in app for a lower/Y-adjusted Matt caption.
styles.best_for: When using the user's custom Matt L1 theme rather than a built-in template.

companion_overlays.name: CA News Top Disclaimer
companion_overlays.look: Pulaski/Jones legal disclaimer at top of frame for CA news videos so it does not collide with the lower-third.

companion_overlays.name: Pulaski/Jones Bottom Disclaimer
companion_overlays.look: Pulaski/Jones legal disclaimer near bottom of frame for videos without a lower-third bar.

companion_overlays.name: Broadcast Blue Lower Third
companion_overlays.look: Cobalt BREAKING NEWS lower-third with headline JUVENILE HALL SEXUAL ABUSE CLAIMS and 30-second CTA.
